name: Down on the Farm Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon and set aside.
2. Drain and slice the potatoes no thicker than 1/4 inch.
3. Brown the potatoes in the reserved bacon grease.
4. Add the onions and green peppers.
5. Beat together the eggs, milk, cooked bacon (in chunks), garlic powder, and Tabasco sauce to taste.
6. Mix in the potatoes and onions.
7. Cook, stirring often, until set.
